programs.title: Her Deadly Night In Paris
programs.desc: (M) An American exchange student in Paris falls for her host family's son. But when she witnesses a murder, it sets off a chain of events that changes their lives forever.

programs.title: Your Boyfriend Is Mine
programs.desc: (M) A man agrees to take a job as the "live-in" manservant to a wealthy businesswoman. He then realizes he has made a deal with the devil.

programs.title: Murder Below Deck
programs.desc: LMN provides drama movies, thrillers, and suspense-filled stories focused on relationships, crime, and real-life inspired events.
